title: Claude Code Skill: Mock Server Scaffolder — Generate Instant API Mocks from Specs or Curl Examples
description: For frontend developers and QA engineers, this skill generates fully functional mock server configurations from OpenAPI specs or raw curl examples so they can unblock UI development and testing without waiting for backend endpoints to be production-ready.
gumroad_description:
Blocked on frontend work because the backend isn't ready yet? Fix that today.

Who this is for:
— Frontend developers waiting on API endpoints that keep getting delayed
— QA engineers who need stable, reproducible mocks for test environments
— Full-stack developers who want to prototype UI without touching production APIs

What's inside:
— 1 ready-to-use SKILL.md file — drop into your project's skills/ folder
— Generates MSW, json-server, or Express mock configs from OpenAPI specs or curl examples
— Realistic fake data, correct HTTP status codes, error handling included
— Usage guide + real slash-command examples

Unblock your UI work in one command. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
